name: OpenIPAHound 22 Research - ManagedBy Control
description: Shows managedBy-derived object-control context. IPA_Owns is non-traversable because managed host, service, and object-control behavior need target-specific validation.
query:
MATCH p=(manager)-[owns:IPA_Owns]->(target)
WHERE manager:IPA_User OR manager:IPA_Group OR manager:IPA_Service OR manager:IPA_Computer OR manager:IPA_HostGroup
RETURN p,
       coalesce(manager.uid, manager.cn, manager.principal, manager.fqdn) AS manager_name,
       coalesce(target.uid, target.cn, target.principal, target.fqdn, target.domain) AS target_name,
       owns.source AS source
LIMIT 1000
